source.body_text_sample:
Menu

Donate
Career Opportunities
Making a positive difference
When you work at Kids Kottage you are making a positive difference in the lives of children and families in our community.

If you are interested in applying for a job opportunity open at Kids Kottage Foundation, please fill out the application portal and attach your resume, cover letter and your qualifications (optional).

**We appreciate the interest of all applicants. However, we will only contact those selected for an interview. **
